week_summary.potential_issues: D034 (Mixed Sprouts Salad with Lemon) is repeated as a dinner booster on Monday (July 27) and Sunday (Aug 2). This is a 6-day gap, violating R007's 10-day window. This was necessary as there are only 6 unique high-protein booster dishes available in the catalog, requiring one repetition over a 7-day period. Breakfast and lunch dishes are fully unique as per C1.
